text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I stretch for five minutes, then drink a glass of water and have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. By 8:00, I start my work as a graphic designer, usually focusing on creative projects until lunch. After work, I go for a 30-minute run or do yoga at home; this keeps me energized and focused. Evenings are for relaxing—I cook dinner, read a book, or call my family. I always go to bed by 11:00 PM. This routine helps me stay productive and balanced every day.
